description: Update CHANGELOG.md with a new version entry documenting all removals and noting WorkerRelay as relay proxy alternative. Final verification pass.
steps: Add a new version entry at the top of CHANGELOG.md (e.g., v0.6.0) with sections: Removed (listing cloud worker system, R2 backup/restore system, usage worker process system, node-machine-id dependency, WorkerProxy directory), Fixed (machineId ESM compatibility - now uses node:crypto + node:os), Changed (usage scheduling now runs in-process via usageRefreshQueue instead of separate worker process), Notes (WorkerRelay can be used as relay proxy alternative for remote access).
Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors remain.
Run npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --root tests to verify remaining tests pass (cloud/R2/usage-worker tests are deleted, so only remaining tests should run).

Run grep across the whole codebase for any stray r2, R2, cloudEnabled, cloudUrls, cloudUrl, cloudSharedSecret, cloudSync, cloudWorker, usageWorker, node-machine-id references that should not exist and fix any found.
acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md has a new version entry documenting all removals
WorkerRelay is mentioned as relay proxy alternative in the changelog
npx vitest run passes (excluding deleted test files)
No stray references to removed systems exist in source code
verification: npx vitest run --reporter=verbose --root tests exits with code 0
grep -r 'node-machine-id' src/ open-sse/ package.json returns no matches
